title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lineatiforme
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lineatiforme, a lesser-known species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lineatiforme include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
